title: Corelib syscall surfaces, docs, and tests

source.subject: corelib: syscall surfaces, docs, and tests

body:
## Outcome

Corelib: syscall surfaces, docs, and tests.

## Context

- Workstream **codegen-runtime** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **Fibers, channels, and GC runtime** (`v02-concurrency-runtime`).
- Corelib sources live in the **corelib** submodule; package identity is **corelib** with workspace publish to pckg.

## Platform specification

- Implements [Panic, I/O, and syscalls](https://beskid-lang.org/platform-spec/execution/runtime/panic-io-and-syscalls) (`/platform-spec/execution/runtime/panic-io-and-syscalls`) *(required)*

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `corelib`
- **Commit:** [`3a9a083`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_standard/commit/3a9a083) — corelib: syscall surfaces, docs, and tests
